title: New video — Fingerdash Full Version
body: The latest video is live on YouTube. Fingerdash, the 23rd main level in Geometry Dash, has a full version that Ethan tries

title: Brawl Stars-dle is live
body: The Brawl Stars guessing game is up and playable. Each day a new brawler is hidden — guess it using the hints. Built entirely from scratch by Ethan.

title: Discord server is open
body: The official TheUnlockedWeb Discord is open to everyone. Join to chat about videos, share your scores on the games, and stay up to date with what Ethan is working on next.

title: Website redesigned
body: TheUnlockedWeb has been redesigned from the ground up — cleaner layout, faster load, and a much better experience across all devices. The source code is on GitHub if you want to take a look.

title: Cookie Clicker game added
body: A fully playable Cookie Clicker is now live on the site. Upgrades, buildings, the whole deal — all built by Ethan in plain HTML, CSS, and JS.

title: Geometry Dash Club page launched
body: A new page dedicated to the GD Club is now live. Find level lists, tips, and community content all in one spot.

title: LEGO Animation series started
body: Ethan has started posting original stop-motion LEGO animations alongside the main gaming content. Check out the animations page for the full collection.

title: Image and Video galleries added
body: Two new gallery pages are live — one for images and one for videos. Head over to browse all the content in one place.

title: Tutorials & Speedruns page is up
body: A dedicated page for tutorials and speedrun content is now live. Whether you want to learn a strat or watch Ethan blast through a level, it's all there.

title: Site goes open source on GitHub
body: The full source code for TheUnlockedWeb is now public on GitHub. Anyone can read, fork, or suggest changes. Link is in the footer.

title: Channel hits a new milestone
body: Thanks to everyone who has watched, liked, and subscribed. The channel keeps growing and there's a lot more content on the way — stay tuned.

title: TheUnlockedWeb launches
body: The site is officially live. It started as a simple page and has grown into a full hub — games, galleries, news, and more. This is just the beginning.
